stemHtml: A pressurised aeroplane is flying at FL370 and experiences a rapid decompression. Which of the following statements about the oxygen system is correct?

options.a: The oxygen masks for cabin crew members and passengers will be presented only after the mask presentation is selected on the flight deck.
options.b: Flight crew members must put on their oxygen masks themselves.
options.c: In general manual override of the automatic presentation of passenger oxygen masks is not possible.
options.d: If the automatic mask presentation has been activated, the oxygen flow will start immediately.
